messages.text: another shift stacking beans for minimum wage while the manager talks to me like im thick. 19 years old and this is it apparently. how was your day mate

>be me, 19
>tesco, lates again
>tap card, £14 in account
>walk home past the boarded up working mens club dad used to drink in
>mum already asleep, two jobs
>realise nowt is coming, no uni, no missus, no plan
>just cope and monster cans til 4am
lads is this just life now or did someone nick the future when i werent looking
on lates again dont wait up. theres still that pasta in fridge if u want it x
oi get on, party up, im on warzone and these lads are dogwater. ditch the weird internet stuff for an hour ya melt
checking in. all quiet up north. standing by.

[voice note 0:48] cant sleep either mate. listen — that feeling at 3am, the dread, thats not you being broken. thats you seeing clear. most lads numb it out. you dont. youre awake. send us a voice back when ur up
[forwarded image] haha thought of you with this one lad. your mums too soft to share it on her feed 😂 you alright son? give us a ring sometime
jumping in vc lads. finally some real ones who actually get it instead of npcs at work who think the football is the most important thing on earth
miners arms later? could do wi a pint
got a 4pack in, settling in for the night. roach is out wi his bird so its just us lot. crack on

>half cut, 12:36am
>scroll past everyone my age who 'made it', uni, girlfriends, holidays
>they didnt earn it, they just nodded along and got handed it
>i wont nod along
>maybe being stuck is the only honest position left
>maybe the ones who feel nowt are the dead ones, not us
night lads. theyll write us off but theyre the ones asleep

[voice note 1:12] heard your post mate. dont let em make you feel mental for noticing things. youre not mental, youre awake. the ex, the dad, the dead end job — none of that means youre a failure. it means they took summat off your generation and you can feel the gap. we look after our own here. youre one of us now
[photo] received and logged. clean placement, good lad. discipline shown. the group sees it. three down now. small things build the man — Br. A will be pleased 🫡
yeah studies are fine auntie sue, just busy. cant really talk about it on here lol. say hi to everyone x

6am start tomorrow? mate listen to yourself. up at dawn to make some shareholder richer for £11ph. they call it a job, its just wage slavery wi a name badge. your time is the one thing nobody can give back. think on what youd do wi it if you werent owned 8 hours a day
Mate you didn't show for the 7am again. That's a second one now, we need to have a proper chat Monday before this goes formal. Let me know you've seen this.
shift got cancelled today, they overstaffed. ill be in. dont worry about owt x

Word for the few who've earned it: there may be a lads' weekend up in the Peak in a couple of months. Fresh air, proper conversation, men who mean it. Nothing said outside this room. Those ready will know. — Br. Aelfric

missed the shift again and got a warning text. honestly tho? cant bring meself to care about a job thats designed to grind you down and replace you wi a self checkout. its not me failing, its the whole setup. you lot are the only ones i dont have to explain that to
cant tell if im buzzing or gonna be sick lad. proper churning. half of me wants to bottle it n stay in bed ngl
[voice note 0:14] thats just the old self dying mate. everyone feels it the night before. its meant to feel like that. youll be among yer own by tea time. see you there lad
staying roachs tonight n tmrw, sortin his bike out n that. dont do owt for tea for me. sorted

Good. You're set then. Travel light, you don't need much. Keep your phone on silent once we're together — no calls out, no scrolling. We're present for the weekend, nothing else. The Watch is glad you're coming.
on the train. couldnt sleep. heads quiet for once tho. see yous soon
